results.title: Master Power Technologies Unveils R50m State-of-the-Art Customer Experience Centre at New Midrand Premises
results.description: This milestone marks a significant step in the company’s continued expansion and commitment to advancing Africa’s data centre infrastructure JOHANNESBURG, SOUTH AFRICA – EQS Newswire – 20 July 2026 – Master Power Technologies (MPT) (https://kva.co.za/), a leading pan-African provider of turnkey data centre and critical power solutions, has unveiled its hi-tech Customer Experience Centre, also [...] The post Master Power Technologies Unveils R50m State-of-the-Art Customer Experience Centre at New Midrand Premises appeared first on SurgeZirc SA .

results.title: Media OutReach Newswire Strengthens USA Distribution Network
results.description: The newswire guarantees online postings on USA Today and increases its guaranteed distribution on high-domain-rating local US news sites to empower AI visibility HONG KONG SAR – Media OutReach Newswire – 20 July 2026 – Media OutReach Newswire, the first global newswire founded in Asia Pacific, has expanded its USA distribution network with additional guaranteed [...] The post Media OutReach Newswire Strengthens USA Distribution Network appeared first on SurgeZirc SA .
